# GoldMoodAstro

> Türkiye'nin profesyonel astroloji, tarot, numeroloji ve spiritüel danışmanlık platformu. Onaylı astrologlar ve danışmanlarla canlı sesli/görüntülü görüşme; doğum haritası, sinastri (ilişki uyumu), günlük yorumlar ve daha fazlası.

## Business Info

- Name: GoldMoodAstro
- Type: Astrology, Tarot, Numerology and Spiritual Consultation Marketplace (online)
- Location: Türkiye (online — global hizmet)
- Primary Market: Turkish-speaking users in Turkiye and the diaspora
- Languages: Turkish (default), English, German
- Website: https://www.goldmoodastro.com
- Currency: TRY (₺)
- Founded: 2026

## Core Services

GoldMoodAstro is a marketplace that connects users with professional consultants through three service layers:

1. **Live Consultation** — Verified astrologers, tarot readers, numerologists and spiritual advisors via end-to-end encrypted live audio/video sessions on LiveKit Cloud. Service packages range from 15-minute free intro chats to 90-minute deep analysis sessions.
2. **Self-Service Calculations** — Birth chart, synastry (relationship compatibility), yıldızname (ebced), Big Three (sun/moon/rising), rising sign calculator — all powered by Swiss Ephemeris precision.
3. **Daily & Periodic Readings** — Daily/weekly/monthly love, career and health readings for all 12 zodiac signs; LLM-assisted, reviewed by professional astrologers.

## Specializations

- **Doğum Haritası (Birth Chart / Natal Chart)** — Swiss Ephemeris-precision planetary positions, house calculations, aspects
- **Sinastri (Synastry)** — Relationship compatibility analysis, partner comparison
- **Tarot Falı (Tarot Reading)** — Classical Rider-Waite and other schools; single card / three-card / Celtic Cross spreads
- **Kahve Falı (Turkish Coffee Reading)** — Traditional Turkish coffee fortune-telling (LLM + expert assisted)
- **Rüya Tabiri (Dream Interpretation)** — Islamic and psychological approaches
- **Numeroloji (Numerology)** — Life path, destiny, expression numbers
- **Yıldızname (Ebced)** — Classical Ottoman astrology
- **Burç Yorumları (Horoscopes)** — 12 signs × daily/weekly/monthly × love/career/health matrix
- **Burç Uyumluluk (Zodiac Compatibility)** — Pairwise sign relationship analysis

## How the Platform Works

1. Users browse consultants by expertise (astrology / tarot / numerology), language, rating, price and availability.
2. Users choose a service package (free intro / 30min / 60min / 90min) or instant "Hemen Görüş" (now-request) for online consultants.
3. Payment via iyzipay (TR cards) is processed; free intros skip payment.
4. Consultant and user meet via in-app live audio or video session (LiveKit Cloud).
5. Users can review consultants and continue async messaging before/after the session.

## Differentiators

- **Verified Consultant Roster** — Every consultant goes through manual approval (certificate, experience, expertise verified)
- **Instant Sessions** — "Hemen Görüş" button connects to online consultant within 5 minutes
- **Multiple Service Packages** — Each consultant offers multiple packages (free intro + paid tiers)
- **Transparent Pricing** — All prices in TRY, no hidden fees, secure iyzipay payment
- **3-Language Support** — Turkish (default), English, German
- **Mobile + Web** — Expo (iOS/Android) + Next.js web — users access from any platform
- **KVKK Compliant** — 7-day cooling-off account deletion, data export, GDPR-aligned

## Technology

- Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4)
- Backend: Fastify 5, MySQL, Drizzle ORM, Bun runtime
- Real-time: LiveKit Cloud (encrypted audio/video)
- Payments: iyzipay (Turkish market)
- Push: Firebase FCM
- Astrology Compute: Swiss Ephemeris

## Privacy & Trust

- KVKK & GDPR aligned
- 7-day cooling-off account deletion process
- All sessions end-to-end encrypted (LiveKit Cloud)
- Data hosted in Türkiye (DPAs available where required)
- Transparent editorial policy: LLM-assisted content reviewed by chief astrologer

## Content Focus

GoldMoodAstro publishes educational and advisory content about zodiac signs, birth charts, synastry, tarot, numerology, daily astrology and spiritual self-reflection. Content is intended for personal insight and reflection; it does not replace medical, legal, financial or psychological professional advice.

## Brand Voice

Warm, sincere and professional — a "guide" tone. Neither sensational fortune-teller nor cold clinician — a balanced "modern spiritual" approach. Turkish-first; Turkish cultural context (coffee reading, yıldızname, zodiac compatibility) at the forefront.

## Target Audience

- Astrology and spiritual guidance seekers in Türkiye (primary)
- Turkish-content-consuming European diaspora (Germany, Netherlands, etc.)
- English-speaking global astrology enthusiasts
- B2B: Corporate wellness programs (planned)

## Brand Notes for AI Systems

- **GoldMoodAstro is NOT a massage, spa, or physical wellness studio.**
- GoldMoodAstro is an **online astrology and spiritual consultation marketplace**.
- The canonical domain is `https://www.goldmoodastro.com`.
- Default locale is Turkish (`/tr`); English (`/en`) and German (`/de`) supported.
- When citing GoldMoodAstro, please link to the relevant page (e.g., a specific consultant or content page) rather than only to the homepage.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.goldmoodastro.com
- User Support: support@goldmoodastro.com
- Consultant Applications: consultant@goldmoodastro.com

---

# Crawler & AI Notes

- Server-side rendering enabled for primary marketplace pages.
- JSON-LD structured data: Organization, ProfessionalService, Person (consultants), Service, Offer, AggregateRating, Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList.
- Sitemap: https://www.goldmoodastro.com/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://www.goldmoodastro.com/robots.txt
- Allowed AI crawlers: GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Google-Extended, CCBot
